$meta.name: SahakarLekha Brand Tokens
$meta.source: Derived from src/index.css :root — the app is the single source of truth. If app tokens change, regenerate hex here and re-run brand-assets/logo/generator.
$meta.usage: Marketing/brand colors for ALL assets — never eyeball colors.

navy.role: Primary. Trust surfaces, headings, wordmark on light bg. App --primary.

orange.role: Accent/saffron. ONE call-to-action per asset, logo tile, highlights. Never body text on white. App --accent.

navyDark.role: Depth. Background shapes/blobs, dark panels, tagline text. App --sidebar-background.

white.role: Reversed text, स glyph on tiles.

warning.role: Caution notes only — do not use decoratively (clashes with brand orange).

destructive.role: Errors/negative numbers only. Never marketing decoration.

info.role: Teal. Secondary chart series, info callouts.

tricolor.rule: Edge strip only (one edge, 4–8px band). Never behind text, never rendered as the national flag, no Ashoka Chakra (flag-code + emblem-act safety).

devanagari.note: Hindi is the FIRST language on every asset. No faux bold/italic on Devanagari.

scale.note: px at 1x digital; print ≥ 9pt Devanagari body.

numerals.digits: Latin digits in accounting contexts; Devanagari digits never for amounts.

spacing.note: 8pt system — all margins/padding in multiples of 8 (4 allowed for fine detail).

logo.masters: brand-assets/logo/SL_B-02_*.svg (paths baked from Hind Bold / Inter SemiBold — no font dependency)
logo.clearSpace: height of the स counter (≈ 25% of tile height) on all sides
